description: Memory storage, embeddings, retrieval, and LLM-powered fact extraction

userStories.title: .1: Memory Storage API
userStories.description: As the system, I need to store memories with embeddings so that I can retrieve them later.
acceptanceCriteria: List query returns memories sorted by `createdAt` (descending)
userStories.notes: Completed on 2026-01-24. All 13 tests passing. createMemory, deleteMemory, listMemories implemented with full validation.

userStories.title: .2: Memory Embedding Generation
userStories.description: As the system, I need to generate embeddings for memory content so that I can perform semantic search.
acceptanceCriteria: Cache embeddings for identical content (optional optimization)
Embedding generation succeeds for valid content
API errors handled gracefully (return null or retry)
userStories.notes: Completed on 2026-01-24. All tests passing. OpenAI API integration with retry logic (3 attempts, exponential backoff).

userStories.title: .3: Memory Retrieval and Ranking
userStories.description: As the system, I need to retrieve and rank memories by relevance, recency, and importance.
acceptanceCriteria: Use Convex vector index for nearest neighbor search
Return top K memories (K=10 by default)
Write unit tests with synthetic data
userStories.notes: Completed on 2026-01-24. All 7 tests passing. Cosine similarity ranking with formula: 0.5*relevance + 0.3*recency + 0.2*importance.

userStories.title: .4: Memory Manager Agent (Dynamic Agent)
userStories.description: As the system, I need to automatically extract and store memories from conversations using a Dynamic Agent with LLM-powered fact extraction.
acceptanceCriteria: `generateEmbedding` - Generate vector embedding using AI SDK
`storeMemory` - Store memory in database with correct scope
Define instructions for fact extraction rules
Run agent with user + assistant messages
Extract tool calls to count stored memories
Prompt engineering for fact extraction (in agent instructions):
Extraction completes in <5s per conversation turn
Failures do not block message send
Dynamic Agent uses tools correctly (extract → embed → store)
